productDisplayName: Fossil Men Midway EX Cap Brown Wallet
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this Midway EX wallet from fossil is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Fossil perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Comes in a vintage style tin.Dimensions: 10.7 cm x 8 cmOne main compartment on a smoothly textured three-fold wallet with embossed branding and fabric liningThree card holder slots and a slip pocket for coins on one foldFour card holder slots on the second fold with a flapTransparent id card holder on either side of the flapThree card holder slots on the third foldCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
